parts.text: Find me the latest ai news in the open source image gen models

Based on the latest search results, here are the key updates in open-source image generation:

🔥 **Major New Release:** Alibaba's Qwen team just launched **Qwen-Image-2512**, a fully open-source, enterprise-grade model positioned as a serious alternative to Google's Imagen. This is a significant new entry in the space. [Source](https://www.opensourceforu.com/2026/01/alibaba-launches-open-source-qwen-image-2512-as-a-serious-alternative-to-googles-image-ai/)

📊 **Current Landscape:** Stable Diffusion (SD 1.4, XL, 3.5 Large) remains one of the most established and widely used open-source families, with continuous development from Stability AI. [Source](https://www.bentoml.com/blog/a-guide-to-open-source-image-generation-models)

📈 **Market Overview:** There are now **at least 7 top-tier open-source models** competing in 2026, with comparisons focusing on quality, speed, and customization options. [Source](https://www.pixazo.ai/blog/top-open-source-image-generation-models)

⚠️ **Note:** OpenAI's new "ChatGPT Images" (GPT Image 1.5) is **not open-source**—it's a proprietary improvement to their paid service, so it doesn't fit your open-source criteria. [Source](https://openai.com/index/new-chatgpt-images-is-here/)

**Bottom line:** The big news is Alibaba's open-source challenge to Google, while Stable Diffusion continues to dominate the community-driven space. The field is getting crowded with high-quality options! 🎨
